title: Farmer's Delight Bark Cutting Compat
description: A datapack that adds the ability to obtain bark with wood from various mods, such as: Biomes O' Plenty, Quark, The Twilight Forest...
body:
A datapack that allows you to strip differents wood blocks on the Farmer's Delight cutting board for bark

Supports mods like:

 

Aether

    Golden Oak
    Skyroot

 

Alex's Caves

    Pewen
    Thornwood

 

Biomes O' Plenty

    Dead
    Fir
    Hellbark
    Jacaranda
    Magic
    Mahogany
    Palm
    Redwood
    Umbran
    Willow

 

Deeper and Darker

    Echo

 

Let's Do Vinery

    Apple
    Dark Cherry

 

Quark

    Ashen
    Azalea
    Trumpet

 

The Twilight Forest

    Canopy
    Dark
    Mangrove
    Mining
    Sorting
    Time
    Transformation
    Twilight Oak

 

Feel free to use this compatibility datapack in your modpack! :D
